prompt: A long, narrow corridor stretches into the distance, its concrete floor cracked and broken, with patches of green weeds pushing through the fissures. On either side, rusted metal railings line the walkway, their surfaces weathered and corroded. The walls are painted a faded white, but large sections have peeled away, revealing the gray concrete beneath. A few fluorescent lights hang from the ceiling, casting a dim, cool glow that highlights the decay. At the far end, a set of stairs ascends into a darker area, and an old, abandoned arcade machine stands near the left railing, its screen dark and unresponsive. The overall atmosphere is one of quiet abandonment and neglect.
